description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc-c++17 that runs on push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow should have two jobs: build-gcc-cpp17-linux-stl and build-gcc-cpp17-linux-no-stl, both running on ubuntu-22.04. Each job checks out the code, sets up the environment, builds with cmake and gcc, and runs tests.
